completion_summary: Bound the local release gate to backend v0.5 evidence and a clean source commit, then passed all 12 commands: claims, Ruff, mypy, 1256 tests with 89% coverage, strict docs, clean wheel, reference validation, runtime/reachability/environment audits, baseline smoke, and candidate integrity; benchmark and frozen-release claims remain disabled.
scope: Bind and execute the complete local quality gate on the final backend v0.5 candidate source, retaining machine-readable command, hash, timing, and failure evidence without enabling benchmark claims
